criteria.criterion: DBB-m27-001: $(cmd) basic substitution (substituteCommands() lines 26-53)
DBB-m27-002: $(cmd) with cat (inner exec calls cat correctly)
DBB-m27-003: Nested $(cmd) depth 2-3 (depth parameter + maxDepth=3 at line 27)
DBB-m27-004: Failed inner command substitutes empty string (line 41: `r.exitCode === 0 ? r.output.trim() : ''`)
DBB-m27-005: Env vars inside command substitution (substituteEnv runs before substituteCommands)
DBB-m27-006: Multiple $(cmd) in single line (while loop at line 30 processes all occurrences)
DBB-m27-007: $(cmd) with pipe inside (inner exec handles pipe parsing)
DBB-m27-008: Empty command substitution $( ) handled gracefully
DBB-m27-009: $(cmd) with surrounding text (result concatenation at line 41)
DBB-m27-010: Glob bracket [abc] character set (matchGlob lines 380-392)
DBB-m27-011: Glob bracket [a-z] range (passes through to regex)
DBB-m27-012: Glob bracket [0-9] range
DBB-m27-013: Glob bracket [!abc] negation (line 385: converts to [^abc])
DBB-m27-014: Glob bracket combined with *
DBB-m27-015: Glob bracket in ls command
DBB-m27-016: Glob bracket empty result
DBB-m27-017: mkdir .keep fallback when fs.mkdir undefined (mkdirOne line 749)
DBB-m27-018: mkdir -p without fs.mkdir falls back to .keep
DBB-m27-019: mkdir with fs.mkdir no regression (mkdirOne line 747)
DBB-m27-020: mkdir readOnly permission denied (checkWritable in mkdir line 756-757)
DBB-m27-021: All m27 tests pass (cmd-substitution-m21, bracket-glob-m21, mkdir-no-keep-fallback)
